description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §2 — every fz fn is Tail-CC. No uniform ABI remains.

Work:
- In src/parking.rs::natively_callable: drop the `parking-reachable → exclude` constraint. Reachability becomes the only gate — fns reachable from main (directly or via cont/closure-target) qualify.
- Admit `Term::Receive { continuation }` to body_ok when continuation.fn_id is in set. Drop cont_blocked entirely.
- Match in ir_codegen.rs type-aware shrink (line ~1591 / ~1665).
- compile_fn: drop the uniform branch entirely. Every fn gets the Tail-CC entry harness.
- Delete `build_fn_signature`'s `if !is_native` branch.
- Remove frame_ptr threading, host_ctx threading, frame_sizes table population per fn (table still used by trampoline until fz-siu.1.13).
- Delete trampoline dispatch for fns that no longer have a uniform body. Trampoline (`run_quantum`) retained as a thin runtime stub until fz-siu.1.13.

Acceptance:
- Generated module contains zero SystemV-CC fz fns (excluding fz_main_entry / fz_resume_park shims from fz-siu.1.11).
- §8.1 full target clif for tail_recursion.fz matches: `function %count(i64,i64,i64) tail` exactly.
- All existing fixtures still produce correct output.
- `compile_uniform_path` / per-fn frame layouts deleted from ir_codegen.
title: fz-cps.1.10: promote all fns to Tail-CC; delete uniform
